## Features

- **AWS Discovery** — VPCs, subnets, Route53 zones, EC2 instances, load balancers
- **Azure Discovery** — VNets, subnets, DNS zones, VMs, load balancers and gateways
- **GCP Discovery** — VPC networks, subnets, Cloud DNS zones, compute instances
- **Active Directory Discovery** — DNS zones, DHCP scopes, user counts via WinRM with multi-DC support
- **NIOS Backup Scanner** — Parse onedb.xml from .tar.gz/.tgz/.bak backups with per-member DDI counts
- **NIOS WAPI Scanner** — Live scanning against NIOS Grid with version cascade and capacity reports
- **Bluecat Scanner** — Dual-version API auth with full DDI resource counting
- **EfficientIP Scanner** — Dual auth with site filtering
- **Token Calculator** — Universal DDI management token estimation across all providers
- **Migration Planner** — Per-member token breakdown with UDDI and NIOS licensing scenarios
- **Server Token Calculator** — Role-based token tiers with XaaS consolidation
- **Excel Export** — Summary, Token Calculator, per-provider, and Errors tabs
- **SSO/Browser Auth** — AWS SSO, Azure Browser SSO, GCP Browser OAuth
- **Embedded Web UI** — Single-page application with credential wizard, no installation required

## Bug Fixes

- **Active IP Attribution** — IPs attributed to subnet-owning member instead of Grid Master via CIDR containment
- **Azure Subscriptions** — Display name resolution in scanner findings
- **AWS STS** — Support for temporary session token credentials
- **NIOS Token Calculation** — Correct NIOS licensing ratios (50/25/13)
- **AD Multi-Server** — Support multiple AD servers and filter zero-count findings
